items.name_en: This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
items.name_cn:
This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
Model: 698567
Size: 24x18x5.5cm

items.name_en: Alligator pattern🐊🐊🐊YSL Saint Laurent bestseller🔥🔥Alligator pattern. [Proud] SAINT LAURENT front flap bag, featuring side accordion pleats, and a leather shoulder strap that can be worn crossbody or folded over the shoulder. The leather-wrapped key ring connects to the metal YSL logo. Size: 24x16x8, Model: Alligator 26606

items.name_en: Saint Laurent Mini 🆕High-profile arrival🔥🔥🔥Y-shaped badge envelope shoulder bag. Due to the bag's shape, the lining needs to be sewn inside out during production, so the leather requirements are extremely high. Too brittle will wrinkle, too soft will lack structure and elasticity. After repeated prototyping, finally presenting this boutique to everyone 💪💪 Size: 20cm, Model No. 26599

items.name_en: New YSL Classic Tote, a fashion mainstay🌟|||🔥This YSL classic tote is simply the king of fashion! It makes you instantly look like a fashionista!😍
items.name_cn:
New YSL Classic Tote, a fashion mainstay🌟|||🔥This YSL classic tote is simply the king of fashion! It makes you instantly look like a fashionista!😍
1️⃣First, the design is truly classic! Stylish yet timeless, which is rare. 👜
2️⃣The material is excellent, comfortable to the touch, and feels very high-quality. 👝
3️⃣The space is large enough to hold many daily essentials, such as a phone, wallet, keys, etc. 📱🏺
4️⃣The strap length is suitable; it can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, very convenient.
5️⃣There are many color choices, suitable for various styles and occasions. The starry grey I got is super versatile! ✨
🔥Overall, this YSL classic tote is a very worthy fashion item! Whether matching outfits or as a daily bag, it is very suitable. 👗👚👠. Dimensions 25x15x8, Style No. 80993

items.name_en: New YSL Saint Laurent Niki Shopping Commuter Bag is the one
items.name_cn:
New YSL Saint Laurent Niki Shopping Commuter Bag is the one
No need to hype up the YSL Niki Shopping bag
The chain is adjustable so it can expand to a large size
Fits a 13-inch laptop, iPad, and the body is classic Niki waxed leather, durable and sturdy, definitely the first choice for commuting and business trips. Dimensions 32x26x10, Style No. 9588
